title: Dungeon Repeater
description:
Vera is a seasoned adventurer who sets out for Grange Island after hearing about its ruler, Lord Anderson, and his call for brave adventurers to help clear the island's monster-infested labyrinth. She's drawn by the thrill of entering and exploring the massive labyrinth - one that many have entered before, though not all have returned alive.

Upon arrival, Vera is given lodging, where she meets a quiet, enigmatic individual named Uno who seems unwilling to open up to her at first but soon becomes her ally. With each descent into the depths, Vera uncovers not only danger, but deeper secrets surrounding Grange Island and Lord Anderson's true intentions.

As Vera ventures further, she begins to suspect the labyrinth holds more than just monsters. While gaining the trust of Lord Anderson, whose motives grow increasingly unclear, she starts piecing together the hidden connections between the cast of characters she's met on the island. 

This fantasy RPG & dungeon crawler features automated battles against mighty foes with a focus on battle preparation and dungeon exploration. Each victory brings a new challenge, and each defeat offers a chance to respawn and refine your strategy. Its brisk pace and cyclical exploration create a gameplay loop that's easy to grasp but rich in strategy. Enjoy experimenting with various class and equipment combinations, as well as the linked skills that enhance your battle experience!

Labyrinth Exploration

At the heart of the game lies the labyrinth. Descend through its layers, facing powerful bosses at key milestones. While in the labyrinth, you can choose to press on or retreat and refine your strategy. Later in the game, you'll even have the chance to face phantom versions of previously defeated bosses for an extra challenge!

Linked Skills

Beyond the wide variety of physical and magical abilities you can learn, Dungeon Repeater introduces linked skills - powerful combinations that can be fused to create new effects, from damaging enemies to supporting Vera. The more you play, the more linked skills you'll uncover to experiment with!

Automated Battles 

You can plan your battle moves in advance, allowing fights to unfold quickly and smoothly without needing any input during combat! Be sure to prepare your movesets before each exploration, and keep your most reliable setups saved for future use!

Changing Classes

You unlock a new class after every boss battle, and additionally there are special classes that require special conditions to be met in order to unlock them. Keep a lookout for them!

Tavern Requests

Pick up a variety of tasks from the tavern bulletin board - from gathering weapons and slaying monsters to lending a hand to islanders in need.
description_short: Vera is a lone adventurer on an endless pilgrimage. Her journey leads her to the enigmatic Grange Island, home to a sprawling underground labyrinth. As she battles through waves of monsters and heads deeper and deeper into the depths, one question remains: what awaits her within the deepest layers?
